consistency.overall: Consistent with standard D&D 5th Edition rules for the Wizard class.
consistency.terminology: Uses standard terms like 'spellcasting ability', 'Intelligence modifier', 'proficiency bonus', 'spell save DC', and 'spell attack modifier'.

quality.clarity: High. Clearly defines Intelligence as the spellcasting ability and provides the exact formulas for calculating Spell Save DC and Spell Attack Modifier.
quality.completeness: Complete. Covers the core mechanical functions of the feature.

mechanics.core_function: Establishes Intelligence as the Wizard's spellcasting attribute.

calculations.name: Spell save DC
calculations.formula: 8 + your proficiency bonus + your Intelligence modifier

calculations.name: Spell attack modifier
calculations.formula: your proficiency bonus + your Intelligence modifier

mechanics.impact: Fundamental feature defining how a Wizard casts spells and interacts with spell save mechanics.

analysis.suggestions: None. This is a foundational, mechanically sound entry for a core class feature.
